parsed.summary: This commit renames an npm scope and adds an interactive menu to a setup command for a Claude plugin. The changes are confined to configuration files (package.json, plugin.json, marketplace.json), markdown documentation (commands/setup.md, CHANGELOG.md, release_card.md). No runtime code, no auth boundaries, no data mutations, no API calls. The risk surface is negligible—worst case is a documentation typo or a stale reference to the old scope name.
